summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X-39MATRIX Messenger app. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend functionality working correctly. Dark theme with red accents (no green) follows user preference.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/health returns ok with service name
Backend: /api/auth/register creates new user with JWT token
Backend: /api/auth/register validates nick length (min 2 chars)
Backend: /api/auth/register validates password length (min 4 chars)
Backend: /api/auth/register rejects duplicate nicks (409)
Backend: /api/auth/login returns JWT token for valid credentials
Backend: /api/auth/login rejects invalid credentials (401)
Backend: /api/auth/me returns current user without password_hash
Backend: /api/users returns user list without password_hash
Backend: /api/rooms returns room list
Backend: /api/security/layers returns 9 layers all ONLINE
Backend: /api/security/alerts returns security alerts
Backend: /api/security/stats returns 40 blocks verified, 9/9 signatures
Backend: /api/manual/layers returns 90+ commands
Backend: Protected endpoints reject requests without token (401)
Backend: Protected endpoints reject invalid tokens (401)
Frontend: Login page renders with X-39MATRIX branding
Frontend: Login page shows Kepler's Vision subtitle
Frontend: Login page has Kepler's Vision background image
Frontend: Registration flow creates new user and logs in
Frontend: Login with existing user (jose/x39matrix) works
Frontend: Main app layout with sidebar navigation (6 sections)
Frontend: Chat view shows user list and empty state
Frontend: Chat view shows chat header when user selected
Frontend: Chat input and send button functional
Frontend: Video call button in chat header
Frontend: Security dashboard shows 9/9 layers ONLINE
Frontend: Security dashboard shows 40 blocks verified
Frontend: Security dashboard shows stats (throughput, uptime, etc)
Frontend: Security dashboard shows alerts with severity
Frontend: Manual verification page shows 9 layer sections
Frontend: Manual verification shows 90+ dfx commands
Frontend: Protect your system page shows 4 recommendation cards
Frontend: Protect page includes L9 Algebra content
Frontend: Support page shows contact info and forensic commands
Frontend: Logout functionality returns to login page
Frontend: Video view shows empty state when no call active
Frontend: No green colors in design (user preference respected)
seed_data_creation: Security layers (9) and alerts (6) are seeded on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend uses FastAPI + python-socketio (ASGI). Socket.io path is /api/socket.io. Security layer data is MOCKED in MongoDB (not connected to real ICP canisters). WebRTC uses Google STUN servers. Test users created during testing: testuser123, testuser1776285964, TEST_user_*

mocked_apis.note: Security layer data is simulated in MongoDB, not queried from ICP mainnet
